_comment: Run ClaudeComms as a Claude Code CHANNEL (research preview) WITHOUT installing the plugin. Replace <ABSOLUTE-PATH-TO> with the absolute path to this repo's plugins/claude-comms, add this server to your project or user .mcp.json, then launch: `claude --strict-mcp-config --mcp-config <this-file> --dangerously-load-development-channels server:claude-comms-channel` (the dev flag TAKES the tagged entry; --strict-mcp-config isolates it from any older installed plugin). COMMS_CHANNEL_MODE=1 makes launch.py run channel_bridge.py (native notifications/claude/channel delivery) instead of the FastMCP bridge. See docs/CHANNELS.md. If you HAVE installed the plugin, you don't need this file — use `--dangerously-load-development-channels plugin:claude-comms@claude-comms` with COMMS_CHANNEL_MODE=1 instead (after v3 is published and reinstalled).
